title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support and model management.

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, embeddings, and tool calls.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with Tokio support.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: Bring local LLM power into VS Code with inline suggestions and chat panel via Ollama.

title: OllamaSharp – .NET Client
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama; supports chat, embeddings, and vision models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local LLMs as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama; reproducible builds and declarative service configuration.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers for CI pipelines and reproducible dev environments.

title: ollama-cli – Go TUI
summary: Terminal UI for Ollama written in Go; browse, download, and chat with models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds local LLM assistance for note summarization and Q&A via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using Ollama models; supports threads and custom system prompts.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot integration for Ollama with group chat whitelist and streaming replies.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, LLaVA, etc.

title: ollama-reddit discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.1.10 with native function-calling/tool-use support.

title: ollama-hackernews launch
summary: Hacker News discussion on Ollama’s launch highlighting ease of setup and comparison to llama.cpp.
